title: Road Race Finale Simulation
description: Practice race-finishing power on fatigued legs
purpose: Practice race-finishing power on fatigued legs

intervals.name: Warmup
intervals.purpose: Prepare system and elevate heart rate

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 1/1. 10:00 at 75%. This is the price of being better. Pay it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Set 0/1. 75% FTP, Seated. 10:00. Maintain smooth power output.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 0 minutes of work done. 68 minutes to go. You can do this.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Rep 1/1. 75% FTP. Your legs filed a complaint. It's under review. (It's not.)
coachingNotes.MIXED: Rep 1/1. 75% FTP, 85-95 rpm. Controlled effort. Execute the plan.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Zone 2. 40:00 at 72%. Boring? Maybe. Effective? Absolutely.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 10 minutes of Z2 work. 85-95 rpm, Seated. Smooth, relaxed pedaling.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 12% into session. Endurance work is never wasted. Every minute builds your foundation.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 28 minutes to go. Your friends are posting threshold intervals. You're being smart. Or lazy. Both?
coachingNotes.MIXED: 40:00 at 72-72%. Relax your grip. Drop your shoulders. Smooth pedaling.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Block 1/1. The discomfort is the adaptation. Embrace it. 6 more blocks to build FTP.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Block 1/1. 63% complete. Hold 95% steady. 23 minutes remain.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 63% complete. Block 1/1. This is where mediocre riders crack. You're pushing through.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 63% done. This is sustainable. Technically. If you redefine 'sustainable.'
coachingNotes.MIXED: Set 1: 5:00 at 95%. Focus on efficient pedal stroke. 6 blocks remaining.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: You're 70% through this session. The deep work happens now, when you're tired.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Interval 3: 110% FTP. You're 55 minutes in. Power should feel hard but repeatable. Adjust if fading.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 5 reps left. 20 minutes total. Your competition quit 20 minutes ago. You're still here.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 70% done. The good news: almost finished. The bad news: 5 intervals left.
coachingNotes.MIXED: 5 intervals left. 20 total minutes. Your lungs are burning. That's adaptation.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: 58 minutes in. Your friends are posting VO2max intervals. You're being smart.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 73% through. Low intensity, high volume. Building the engine from ground up.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 73% done. 18 minutes left. Not every workout needs to hurt. This is smart training.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 73% done. 18 minutes left. This feels like cheating. It's not. It's science. Probably.
coachingNotes.MIXED: 58 minutes of Z2. Easy effort. This is recovery in disguise.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: 76% done. 3 intervals left. 17 minutes total. Don't quit now.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Interval 5. 50min of work accumulated. Quality over quantity from here.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Interval 5/8. Every rep makes you stronger. Keep pushing. 3 more to go.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 76% done. 3 intervals left. Only. ONLY. *nervous laughter*
coachingNotes.MIXED: Interval 5/8. 130% FTP × 1:00. Seated. Stay smooth. Breathe deep.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: 61 minutes of base work. This feels like nothing. That's exactly the point.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 15 minutes remaining. Sub-threshold aerobic work. Training fat oxidation.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 15 minutes to go. Consistency over intensity. You're doing the work that matters.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 75% FTP. This is so easy it's almost boring. Almost.
coachingNotes.MIXED: 15 minutes to go. Easy does it. 75% FTP. Build your engine.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: 1 blocks left. 10 minutes total. You wanted faster. This is how. Stop thinking, pedal.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 80% through session. Block 1/1. You've done 53min of threshold work.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 1 blocks to go. 10 minutes. This discomfort is temporary. The fitness is permanent.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Only 10 more minutes of this very special kind of suffering. Define 'only.'
coachingNotes.MIXED: 80% into session. Seated at 85-95 rpm. Stay controlled — smooth is fast.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Final interval. 200% for 30s. Then 10min cooldown. Leave nothing.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Final interval: 200% × 30s. Then 10min easy. Finish strong.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Final interval! 30s at 200%. Then you're done. Make it count.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Final interval. 200% for 30s. Then 10min to question life choices.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Final interval. 200% × 30s. Alternating, 95-120 rpm. Finish what you started.

intervals.name: Cool-down
intervals.purpose: Gradually lower heart rate and begin recovery

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Interval 1/1. 87% through. Pain is temporary. Regret lasts forever. Finish this.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 87% complete. Rep 1/1. 60% at 85-95 rpm. Hold form — don't let it drift.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Interval 1/1. Every rep makes you stronger. Keep pushing. 0 more to go.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 87% complete. Fun fact: suffering builds character. You're very character-rich right now.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Interval 1/1. 60% FTP × 10:00. Seated. Stay smooth. Breathe deep.
